label: Prohibited AI practices and AI literacy
summary: In force. Bans on unacceptable-risk practices (Article 5) and deployer AI-literacy duties (Article 4) apply.

label: Governance rules and general-purpose AI model obligations
summary: In force. GPAI model transparency obligations and the AI Act governance bodies apply; Commission enforcement powers over GPAI providers begin 2 August 2026.

label: Most AI Act obligations, including Annex III high-risk systems
summary: Legally in force on this date under the adopted AI Act. The Digital Omnibus on AI (provisional agreement May 2026, close to adoption — not yet published in the Official Journal) would defer stand-alone Annex III high-risk obligations to 2 December 2027.

label: High-risk AI systems embedded in regulated products
summary: Application date for Annex I product-embedded high-risk systems under the adopted AI Act. The Digital Omnibus on AI would defer this to 2 August 2028 (provisional, pending formal adoption).
